title: COMMUNITY EDUCATION - 211info
text: HEALTH EDUCATION CENTER COMMUNITY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hillsboro Medical Center offers a variety of community education classes. Classes include childbirth education, newborn care, infant massage, breastfeeding support, and CPR & first aid classes. 334 SE 8th Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Class and support group times vary and may include the evening and weekends. (503) 681-1700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 681-1700 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information and to register FEES: Some classes are free, other have a fee; support groups are free. See website for information. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 57 and MAX Stop at Eighth Avenue in Hillsboro Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education General Health Education Programs Weight Management Support Groups If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEALTH EDUCATION CENTER
